title: doronicum grandiflorum var. pyrenaicum
intro: Doronicum grandiflorum var. pyrenaicum, commonly known as the Pyrenean leopard's bane, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Doronicum grandiflorum var. pyrenaicum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
